_publications._publicationTitle: Hybrid Minigene Assay: An Efficient Tool to Characterize mRNA Splicing Profiles of

_contextSnippet: CADD score was below 15 and thus was considered not significant...showed a CADD score of 22.5 (with a pathogenic computational verdict)
details: CADD score below 15 for c.5694G > A was considered not significant, consistent with minigene results showing no splicing effect. CADD score of 22.5 for c.4538_4540delGAC supported pathogenic prediction
